mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM notice
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY priority DESC, publish_time DESC, create_time DESC

SELECT n.*, IF(nr.id IS NULL, 0, 1) AS read_flag FROM notice n LEFT JOIN notice_read nr ON nr.notice_id = n.id AND nr.user_id = #{userId} WHERE n.status = 1
AND (n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR n.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY n.priority DESC, n.publish_time DESC, n.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice n WHERE n.status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notice_read nr WHERE nr.notice_id = n.id AND nr.user_id = #{userId} )
